old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.39","title":"Recover Python secure CoAP ordering","description":"Recover atomic request-token consumption, EDHOC TOFU-before-context publication, fail-closed config writes, SOS type validation, and bounded sent-message retention.","acceptance_criteria":"Tokens consume exactly once under concurrency; TOFU mismatch stores no context; config writes default deny; malformed SOS rejects; retention is bounded; focused tests, Ruff, mypy, and three reviews pass.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-17T19:09:51.228709Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T19:09:51.228709Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.39","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T19:09:51.355656Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
